assignments.description: Add to a collection so it can be used as an input variable on a sub-flow which prepares Assets On Ticket and Assembly On Ticket records for attachment to the sub-ticket
assignments.name: Add_Sub_Ticket_To_Create_To_Collection
assignments.label: Add Sub-Ticket To Create To Collection

assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Assign_Record_Types_To_Collection_Variable
assignments.label: Copy 2 of Assign Record Types To Collection Variable

assignments.description: Fill in a text collection variables with the Content Document Ids inherited from the main ticket, along with any extra content document ids that were added in.
assignments.name: Create_Collection_Of_All_Content_Document_Ids
assignments.label: Create Collection Of All Content Document Ids

assignments.description: If no new content document has been uploaded, create a collection of only inherited content document ids
assignments.name: Create_Collection_Of_Inherited_Content_Document_Ids
assignments.label: Create Collection Of Inherited Content Document Ids

assignments.name: Relate_Ticket_Assignee_to_SubTicket
assignments.label: Relate Ticket Assignee to SubTicket

assignments.name: Set_Non_Carlyle_Asset_on_Ticket_To_Create_Variable
assignments.label: Set Non Carlyle Asset on Ticket To Create Variable

assignments.name: Set_Selected_Attachments_To_Add
assignments.label: Set Selected Attachments To Add

assignments.name: Set_Selected_Attachments_To_Remove
assignments.label: Set Selected Attachments To Remove

decisions.name: Are_Assets_Either_Attached_Or_Not_Required
decisions.label: Are Assets Either Attached Or Not Required?

decisions.name: Assets_Assemblies_On_Tickets_To_Be_Created
decisions.label: Assets & Assemblies On Tickets To Be Created?

rules.name: Yes_Assets_Assemblies_On_Ticket_To_Be_Created
rules.label: Yes - Assets & Assemblies On Ticket To Be Created

decisions.name: Contracts_On_Ticket_To_Be_Created
decisions.label: Contracts On Ticket To Be Created?

rules.name: Yes_Contracts_On_Ticket_To_Be_Created
rules.label: Yes - Contracts On Ticket To Be Created

decisions.description: If user entered a value in the Assigned To field on the Ticket creation screen, then create a Ticket Assignee record and relate to the new Sub-Ticket
decisions.name: Did_User_Assign_Ticket
decisions.label: Did User Assign Ticket?

decisions.description: If user is on one of these profiles, they should be able to select Lease Management record type, otherwise, they should not
decisions.name: Is_User_Sys_Admin_Or_Lease_Management
decisions.label: Is User Sys Admin Or Lease Management

rules.name: Yes_Sys_Admin_or_Lease_Management
rules.label: Yes - Sys Admin or Lease Management

decisions.description: Direct flow down a path based on button clicks in the Ticket Management Screen
decisions.name: Manage_Attachments_Or_Create_Ticket
decisions.label: Manage Attachments Or Create Ticket?

decisions.description: If new files were uploaded, add them to the collection of content document ids
decisions.name: Were_New_Files_Uploaded
decisions.label: Were New Files Uploaded?

rules.name: Data_Quality_Request_System_Enhancement_Request
rules.label: Data Quality Request / System Enhancement Request

formulas.name: f_AssembliesQuery
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c, leaseworks__Engine_Type_Variant__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "LIMIT 3",
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c, leaseworks__Engine_Type_Variant__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "WHERE Name LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Asset__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "LIMIT 3" )

formulas.name: f_AssetInputInvalid
formulas.expression:
OR(
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = True, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset_MSN__c} != Null )
,
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} != Null, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = False
) )

formulas.name: f_AssetsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c, Transaction_Code__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c LIMIT 1", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c, Transaction_Code__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' LIMIT 1" )

formulas.name: f_AssetsRequired
formulas.expression:
IF( {!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'pro_System_Enhancement_Request' || {!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'Lease_Management' || ( {!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'pro_Data_Quality_Request' && NOT( CONTAINS({!Object}, 'Asset') )
&& NOT( CONTAINS({!Object}, 'Assembly') ) ), False, True )

formulas.name: f_AttachedContractsOrPlaceholder
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISBLANK({!Create_Contracts_To_Attach_Name_Collection}), {!Create_Contracts_To_Attach_Name_Collection} = "[]" ), "No Contracts on Ticket", SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Create_Contracts_To_Attach_Name_Collection}, "[", ""), "]", ""), ",", ", ") )

formulas.name: f_ContractsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number_Contracts}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c FROM leaseworks__Lease__c LIMIT 8", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Lease__c " & "WHERE pro_Asset_Name__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number_Contracts} & "%' " & "LIMIT 8" )

formulas.description: Formula returns the required Lease field value if the ticket Type is Lease Management. Otherwise, returns non required field value
formulas.name: f_LeaseLookupIdBasedOnTicketType
f_MiddleSectionTitleDynamic
formulas.expression: IF({!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'pro_System_Enhancement_Request', 'Business Case & Security Considerations', 'Link Ticket To Records')

formulas.description: If Non Carlyle Asset is checked then return Non Carlyle Asset MSN, otherwise maintain Ticket value.
formulas.name: f_NonCarlyleMSNInputOrTriggeringTicketAssets
f_varActionInputVariable
formulas.expression:
IF( {!bb_LinkSelectedRecords.value} = 'Link Selected Records', 'Add',
IF( {!bb_RemoveSelectedRecords.value} = 'Remove Selected Records', 'Remove', '' ))

Flow.interviewLabel: Prodigy - Screen - Create Subtickets Dynamic Linking {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Create Subtickets Dynamic Linking

recordLookups.name: Get_Assemblies_To_Be_Inherited_To_Sub_Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Document_Links_For_Main_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Content Document Links For Main Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Contracts_To_Be_Inherited_To_Sub_Ticket
recordLookups.label: Get Contracts To Be Inherited To Sub-Ticket

recordLookups.name: Get_Record_Types_Excl_Lease_Management
recordLookups.label: Get Record Types Excl. Lease Management

recordLookups.name: Get_Record_Types_Incl_Lease_Management
recordLookups.label: Get Record Types Incl. Lease Management

recordUpdates.name: Clear_Assets_Assemblies_Transaction_Codes_Fields
recordUpdates.label: Clear Assets, Assemblies, Transaction Codes Fields

recordUpdates.name: Update_Assets_Assemblies_Fields_On_Ticket
recordUpdates.label: Update Assets & Assemblies Fields On Ticket

fields.name: NoAssetError
fields.fieldText: At least one Asset must be attached to this Ticket.

fields.name: TicketCreationInputScreenTitle
fields.fieldText:
{!Select_a_Ticket_type}


Information

fields.name: Current_Challenge_Pain_Point_what_is_not_working_today
fields.fieldText: Current Challenge / Pain Point (what is not working today?)

fields.name: Expected_Outcome_time_saved_risk_reduction_compliance_revenue
fields.fieldText: Expected Outcome (time saved, risk reduction, compliance, revenue)

fields.name: AttachedAssetsAssembliesDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Assets: {!f_AttachedAssetsOrPlaceholder}

Assemblies: {!f_AttachedAssembliesOrPlaceholder}

fields.name: AssetsAndAssembliesNotRequired
fields.fieldText:
Assets / Assemblies are not required for this Ticket type.


Click Create Sub-Ticket

fields.name: AddAssetsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Enter a serial number to search for any Asset or Assembly. Select the desired Assets or Assemblies in the datatables and click the button Add.

fields.name: RemoveAssetsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Select the desired Assets or Assemblies from the datatables then click Remove

fields.name: AddContractsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Enter a serial number to search for any Contract. Select the desired Contracts in the datatable and click the button Add.

fields.name: RemoveContractsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Select the desired Contracts from the datatable then click Remove

subflows.name: Prodigy_Auto_Prepare_Variables_To_Attach_Assets_Assemblies_To_Ticket_Flow_1
subflows.label: Prodigy - Auto - Prepare Variables To Attach Assets & Assemblies To Ticket Flow 1

subflows.name: Update_Assignee_Role_Lookups_On_Ticket
subflows.label: Update Assignee Role Lookups On Ticket

transforms.name: Create_Assemblies_On_Main_Ticket_Id_Collection
transforms.label: Create Assemblies On Main Ticket Id Collection

transforms.name: Create_Assembly_To_Attach_Name_Collection
transforms.label: Create Assembly To Attach Name Collection

transforms.name: Create_Asset_To_Attach_Name_Collection
transforms.label: Create Asset To Attach Name Collection

transforms.name: Create_Assets_On_Main_Ticket_Id_Collection
transforms.label: Create Assets On Main Ticket Id Collection

transforms.name: Create_Contracts_On_Main_Ticket_Id_Collection
transforms.label: Create Contracts On Main Ticket Id Collection

transforms.name: Create_Contracts_To_Attach_Name_Collection
transforms.label: Create Contracts To Attach Name Collection

variables.description: A collection of the Assemblies selected to be attached to the sub-ticket
variables.name: varAssembliesToAttach

variables.description: Used for building up list of assets minus those selected to be removed.
variables.name: varAssetsToAttachPlaceholder

variables.description: A collection of the Assets selected to be attached to the sub-ticket
variables.name: varAssetsToAttch

variables.description: A collection of the names of Content Document files to be uploaded.
variables.name: varContentDocumentNameCollection

variables.description: Placeholder variable allows for carrying over of Serial Number text input value between screen changes.
variables.name: varSerialNumberPlaceholder

variables.description: Variable for the creation of an assignee to be related to the new sub-ticket
variables.name: varTicketAssigneeToCreate
